title: File & Webhook Utilities
description: Utility actor for file delivery URL lookup and webhook connectivity verification. Pricing: File download URL and webhook verification are free utility operations unless future pricing is configured.

operation.title: What do you want to do?
operation.description: Choose the workflow. Failed requests and status polling are not charged.

deliveryType.title: Delivery type
deliveryType.description: Delivery type for file download URL lookup.

challenge.title: Webhook challenge
challenge.description: Optional challenge string returned by webhook verification.

maxRetries.title: Max retries
maxRetries.description: Retries for temporary rate-limit and server errors.
